channel.title: Arcane City Events - Next 14 Days
channel.description: Upcoming Arcane City events from 2026-06-22 through the next 14 days.

item.title: [06/22] Sharp Pins with The Garment District and The Elastics @ Bottlerocket Social Hall
item.description:
Sharp Pins headline an all-ages show at Bottlerocket Social Hall with support from The Garment District and The Elastics.

Venue: Bottlerocket Social Hall

View event on Arcane City

item.title: [06/22] Passion Pit: The Pretty Penny Tour @ Stage AE
item.description:
Passion Pit brings The Pretty Penny Tour to Stage AE in Pittsburgh on June 22, 2026.

Venue: Stage AE

View event on Arcane City

item.title: [06/22] Nekromantix with The Rumours & Legendary Hucklebucks @ Crafthouse Stage
item.description:
Psychobilly legends Nekromantix headline at Crafthouse Pittsburgh with special guests The Rumours and Legendary Hucklebucks.

Venue: Crafthouse Stage

View event on Arcane City

item.title: [06/23] Teenage Bottlerocket with The Holy Mess and Latecomer @ Mr. Smalls
item.description:
Teenage Bottlerocket headlines at Mr. Smalls with support from The Holy Mess and Latecomer.

Venue: Mr. Smalls

View event on Arcane City

item.title: [06/23] Reel Q Presents: A Pride Month Screening of “10s Across the Borders” @ City of Asylum
item.description:
Grab a friend and celebrate Pride Month with a FREE screening, presented in partnership with one of the oldest LGBTQ+ film festivals in the world.

Venue: City of Asylum

View event on Arcane City

item.title: [06/23] Thee Windows, Chameleon Treat, Flower Ranger, Aloner @ The Government Center
item.description:
Thee Windows celebrate their 'Out &amp;amp;amp;amp;amp; Down' vinyl release on their Summer Tour with support from Chameleon Treat, Flower Ranger, and Aloner at Government Center in Pittsburgh.

Venue: The Government Center

View event on Arcane City

item.title: [06/24] Improv! with Suzi Barrett & Ryan Rosenberg
item.description:
Live improv comedy with Suzi Barrett and Ryan Rosenberg of the 'Yes, Also' Podcast, presented by Bottlerocket.

View event on Arcane City

item.title: [06/24] Circles Around the Sun: Summer Spin 2026
item.description:
Circles Around the Sun performs at Thunderbird Music Hall on June 24th, 2026, with support from The Wildmans.

View event on Arcane City

item.title: [06/25] Dark Thoughts, Grassy Knoll, United State, Blessed State @ 222 Ormsby
item.description:
A punk/hardcore birthday bash featuring Dark Thoughts, Grassy Knoll, United Stare, and Blessed State at 222 Ormsby.

Venue: 222 Ormsby

View event on Arcane City

item.title: [06/25] Thursday Night Jazz: The Soup Session Blends Jazz with Hip Hop @ City of Asylum
item.description:
James Johnson III, Ross Antonich, Joe Garner, Lorenze Jefferson, Michael Bernabe, Mike Hugo, and Alex Perez cook up innovative jazz hip hop fusions to bring a new sound to the steel city.

Venue: City of Asylum

View event on Arcane City

item.title: [06/25] Paco Cathcart (The Cradle), Mold Rush, Cereal Brothers (Alvin Row + Jim Lingo), Ségolène Pihut @ Telephone
item.description:
A calender of events, concerts, club nights, weekly and monthly events series, promoters, artists, producers, djs, venues and other entities.

Venue: Telephone

View event on Arcane City

item.title: [06/25] Brake Run Album Release w/ Sgt. Hare Apollo and A Cute Angel @ The Government Center
item.description:
Local gazers celebrate their new album with Columbus alt-rockers and sweet baby angels

Venue: The Government Center

View event on Arcane City

item.title: [06/25] Deep End w/ Eddie Logix (Detroit) @ Goldmark
item.description:
A free deep house and nu disco night at The Goldmark featuring Eddie Logix (Detroit), NOCASINO, and Alynment.

Venue: Goldmark

View event on Arcane City

item.title: [06/26] Turn It Upstream Music Festival @ Frick Park Hollow
item.description:
Turn It Upstream Music Festival comes to Frick Park Hollow in Pittsburgh, PA on Friday, June 26, 2026.

Venue: Frick Park Hollow

View event on Arcane City

item.title: [06/26] Pittsburgh Noise Fest 2026 @ Little Giant
item.description:
Two-day noise and experimental music festival at Little Giant.

Venue: Little Giant

View event on Arcane City

item.title: [06/26] Friday Night Specials: Vireo + Astrology Now @ Mattress Factory
item.description:
Live music in the Winnifred Lutz Garden featuring Vireo and Astrology Now.

Venue: Mattress Factory

View event on Arcane City

item.title: [06/26] X-isles presents DJ B-Czar & DJ Slaughter @ Tiki Lounge @ Tiki Lounge
item.description:
Synth treats & Dark beats - No Cover - Early Dance Party!

Venue: Tiki Lounge

View event on Arcane City

item.title: [06/26] Summer of Rust 2026 @ 150 West St
item.description:
Industrial, jungle, synthwave, and digital hardcore night

Venue: 150 West St

View event on Arcane City

item.title: [06/26] Telecommunity @ Trace Brewing
item.description:
Free DJ night at Trace Brewing featuring DJs Vick (NYC), Ericson TM, and Good Dude Lojack with live visuals and a merch drop.

Venue: Trace Brewing

View event on Arcane City

item.title: [06/26] Perennial @ Roboto Project
item.description:
Perennial headlines an all-ages punk/indie show at Mr. Roboto Project with Making Friends As Adults, Dewey Decibel System, and Geese Teeth.

Venue: Roboto Project

View event on Arcane City

item.title: [06/26] Live Comedy @ Corner Cafe
item.description:
A live stand-up comedy show featuring a comedian as seen on Netflix, SXSW, SiriusXM, Roast Battle, Tubi, Cracked Comedy Club, and Amazon Prime Video.

Venue: Corner Cafe

View event on Arcane City

item.title: [06/26] L.M.I. / Eye Contact / Injection Site / Pulverizer / While We Rest @ 222 Ormsby
item.description:
A heavy multi-band showcase featuring stoner punk, mathcore, metalcore, grind, and hardcore at 222 Ormsby in Pittsburgh.

Venue: 222 Ormsby

View event on Arcane City

item.title: [06/26] Xen Chron, Indek, Qancel, Cutups @ Brillobox
item.description:
BXC Collective throws a night of wild techno, IDM, electro, jungle, braindance, and breakcore with live electronic and DJ sets at Brillobox.

Venue: Brillobox

View event on Arcane City

item.title: [06/26] Celestial Bodies: CANCER SZN @ Spirit Lodge
item.description:
Celestial Bodies is an open format dance party, with an emphasis on electronic music, that celebrates a different zodiac sign every month.

Venue: Spirit Lodge

View event on Arcane City

item.title: [06/27] of Montreal w/ Cormae @ Mr. Smalls
item.description:
Indie pop icons of Montreal perform at Mr. Smalls Theatre with Cormae.

Venue: Mr. Smalls

View event on Arcane City

item.title: [06/27] Insane Clown Posse On Tour
item.description:
Insane Clown Posse brings their On Tour show to Stage AE Outdoors in Pittsburgh, PA on Saturday, June 27, 2026.

View event on Arcane City

item.title: [06/27] Steel City Bass 2 Year Anniversary @ Squirrel Hill Sports Bar
item.description:
Steel City Bass celebrates its 2-year anniversary with a free bass music DJ night at Vault 412 in Pittsburgh.

Venue: Squirrel Hill Sports Bar

View event on Arcane City

item.title: [06/27] RISING SEAS + VULGAR MACHINES + EAST COAST ENVY @ The Government Center
item.description:
A night of fast melodic punk

Venue: The Government Center

View event on Arcane City

item.title: [06/27] ENBEATZ: Hot Goth Summer -Sapphic Edition- @ Harold
item.description:
A dark, beachy sapphic dance party blending goth aesthetics with summer vibes, featuring femme-forward sounds, and queer connection at Harold’s Haunt on June 27.

Venue: Harold

View event on Arcane City

item.title: [06/27] ACT UP PGH x Pamplemousse Prom @ Mary&amp;amp;amp;amp;amp;amp;amp;amp;amp;amp;amp;amp;amp;amp;amp;apos;s
item.description:
A fizzy sapphic dance party prom night with DJs UV Loop and Mary Mack, benefiting ACT UP PGH and TransYouniting.

Venue: Mary&amp;amp;amp;amp;amp;amp;amp;amp;amp;amp;amp;amp;amp;amp;amp;apos;s

View event on Arcane City

item.title: [06/28] Dormont Pride in the Park
item.description:
Returning to Dormont Park on Sunday June 28!

View event on Arcane City

item.title: [06/28] CLP Main Percussion Jam @ Carnegie Library of Pittsburgh - Main (Oakland)
item.description:
Monthly Percussion Jam Session Series

Venue: Carnegie Library of Pittsburgh - Main (Oakland)

View event on Arcane City

item.title: [06/28] Hell in a Cell Anniversary Show: Fuzznaut, Old Dream, Moemaw Naedon, Terminal Stare @ Shred Shed
item.description:
An all-ages afternoon show at the Shred Shed celebrating the 28th anniversary of WWE's King of the Ring Hell in a Cell match with live bands and a DJ set.

Venue: Shred Shed

View event on Arcane City

item.title: [06/28] Empty Heaven / Life Accident / Pluto in Furs / Burnt Feathers at Blood Garden @ Blood Garden
item.description:
A house show in Troy Hill featuring Chicago prog pop solo piano and three Pittsburgh acts spanning post rock, trip hop, baritone croon, and noise electronics.

Venue: Blood Garden

View event on Arcane City

item.title: [06/28] Rugg-A-Palooza II: Judgement Day @ Ruggers
item.description:
Blackseed Services presents Rugg-A-Palooza II: Judgement Day, a free multi-band rock showcase at Ruggers in Pittsburgh.

Venue: Ruggers

View event on Arcane City

item.title: [06/28] Oracle Plus, Evil Curtain, Bella Figlia @ Telephone
item.description:
A surrealist theater and music night featuring Oracle Plus from NM, Evil Curtain of 7d, and Bella Figlia at Telephone Bar in Pittsburgh.

Venue: Telephone

View event on Arcane City

item.title: [06/29] Heavy Peasant, Better Plastic, Challice, Urns @ The Government Center
item.description:
NYC-based noisepunk/hardcore/powerviolence trio Better Plastic is on tour with Challice &amp;amp;amp;amp;amp;amp;amp;amp;amp;amp;amp;amp; will be joined by locals Urns and Heavy Peasant

Venue: The Government Center

View event on Arcane City

item.title: [06/29] An Evening with Souled American @ Spirit
item.description:
Legendary alt-country band Souled American performs an intimate evening show at Spirit Lodge in Pittsburgh.

Venue: Spirit

View event on Arcane City

item.title: [06/30] World Literature: Rodrigo Hasbún’s “The Invisible Years” (Bolivia) @ City of Asylum
item.description:
English PEN Award winner Rodrigo Hasbún and moderator Anderson Tepper dive into the secrets and shrapnel of a 20-year-old friendship ripped apart in Rodrigo’s new novel.

Venue: City of Asylum

View event on Arcane City

item.title: [06/30] Earl Sweatshirt & MIKE - On The Orange Tour @ Roxian Theater
item.description:
Earl Sweatshirt and MIKE live at Roxian Theater with Harrison (Surf Gang).

Venue: Roxian Theater

View event on Arcane City

item.title: [07/01] Keep On Hoping Tour - Sunflower Summit with Big Ruth / Almost Exactly Like Julia / Sports Radio @ The Government Center
item.description:
Sunflower Summit (she/they) is a queer Latinx Chicago based artist, writing and performing music that hits right in the feels.

Venue: The Government Center

View event on Arcane City

item.title: [07/01] ELIXR @ Goldmark
item.description:
ELIXR is a monthly club night at The Goldmark featuring DJs Eryn Evans, Subdrip, Disco Pope, and Esoterics.

Venue: Goldmark

View event on Arcane City

item.title: [07/02] July 2nd: Community Against Cancer Benefit Emo Show @ Roboto Project
item.description:
Emo show at the Mr. Roboto Project to benefit the Woodward family's cancer treatment fund, ft. Short Fictions, Kwarter Zip, Trace Remains, Hey! TV Boy! (FL), and Spit Vision (NY).

Venue: Roboto Project

View event on Arcane City

item.title: [07/02] Two of Anything + Christopher Hoffman Solo Cello @ Baum Baum Club
item.description:
An intimate evening of avant-garde and experimental music featuring Two of Anything and Christopher Hoffman on solo cello at Baum Baum Club in Pittsburgh.

Venue: Baum Baum Club

View event on Arcane City

item.title: [07/02] E_DEATH, hazelboy, wax cat & DJ hare Apollo at Remedy @ Remedy
item.description:
A calender of events, concerts, club nights, weekly and monthly events series, promoters, artists, producers, djs, venues and other entities.

Venue: Remedy

item.description:
A multi-artist club night featuring DJs, live performances, and projections at Sidequest in Pittsburgh.

Venue: Side Quest

item.title: [07/04] DSBBQ IV @ Polish Hell Oubliette
item.description:
Fourth annual DSBBQ heavy music outdoor gathering featuring metal and doom acts at Polish Hell Oubliette.

Venue: Polish Hell Oubliette

item.description:

Venue: Roboto Project

item.description:
A dark Latin dance party celebrating Latin goth, darkwave, electro, and industrial artists at The Gloom Room.

Venue: Squirrel Hill Sports Bar

View event on Arcane City

item.title: [07/04] Tails From The Cryptid @ Hot Mass
item.description:
Dog Noise presents a late-night electronic dance event at Hot Mass featuring Justin Cudmore, Rojo, and Ballooney Tunes.

Venue: Hot Mass

View event on Arcane City

item.title: [07/05] Gadget Playground @ Carnegie Library of Pittsburgh - Main (Oakland)
item.description:

Venue: Carnegie Library of Pittsburgh - Main (Oakland)

item.title: [07/05] Painting with Paul @ Spirit
item.description:
A rooftop painting session with Paul featuring a $25 paint kit included.

Venue: Spirit

View event on Arcane City

item.title: [07/05] ...By The Deed EP Release Show: A Benefit for Families Impacted by ICE @ Spirit
item.description:
All-ages hardcore benefit show featuring ...By The Deed's EP release, Body Farm, Bolt Action, Wrung, and more at Spirit Music Hall.

Venue: Spirit
